workspaceDescription: A monorepo-ready workspace shell with Effect and i18n hooks.
workspaceStatusNote: Paraglide is now driving localized copy in locale-prefixed routes.
landingUiHeroFlowTitle: From checkout to code entry in minutes
landingUiHeroFlowLead: The self-service journey keeps the day moving without waiting for staff or handoffs.
landingUiHeroFlowStepOneText: Pick a day pass, workstation, or private office setup that matches the day ahead.
landingUiHeroFlowStepTwoText: Every booking turns into a unique code so entry stays fast, flexible, and contactless.
landingUiHeroFlowStepThreeText: Arrive in Palmovka, unlock the door, and shift from setup mode to work in minutes.
landingMetadataTitle: Deskohub Workspace | Self-service cowork, events, and private rooms in Palmovka
landingMetadataDescription: Book Deskohub Workspace for cowork days, team events, private offices, and TTRPG sessions in Palmovka with 24/7 code access.
landingHeroTitle: The first self-service workspace on Palmovka.
landingHeroSubtitle: Pro equipment, absolute focus, and infrastructure that turns into a gaming sanctuary in the evening. Code entry, open 24/7.
landingRozcestnikDescription: Workspace = focus + events + private sessions. One address, two modes of your day.
landingRozcestnikBarText: Party energy, drinks, noise, and an open community where players and creators connect.
landingRozcestnikWorkspaceTitle: Workspace - Where people create and win
landingRozcestnikWorkspaceText: Cowork, pro events, and private campaigns in a calm space built around output.
landingTtrpgText: Forget playing in a living room full of interruptions. Book our sound-insulated meeting room that turns into a TTRPG sanctuary every evening.
landingTtrpgFeatureOneText: Set the scene from deep forests to lava fields with flexible lighting.
landingTtrpgFeatureTwoText: Plenty of room for maps, miniatures, dice, and manuals.
landingTtrpgFeatureThreeText: Snacks and drinks are right behind the door, with no roleplay breaks.
landingTtrpgDetail: A room tuned for immersion, focus, and long evening sessions.
landingEventsText: Need a workshop, team day, or community meetup for 30-60 people? Our multifunctional Palmovka space adapts to your format.
landingEventsFeatureOne: Flexible layout: wheel-based furniture transforms cowork into lecture setup in 10 minutes
landingEventsFeatureTwo: Tech stack: projection, sound, and high-speed internet
landingEventsFeatureThree: Catering: self-service bar with signature sandwiches and unlimited coffee
landingEventsFoodCallout: No waiting for staff. Food is ready in our smart fridge: signature sourdough sandwiches from CZK 125 / 2 pcs, quiche CZK 95, jar salad CZK 145.
landingEventsFullSpaceRentalDetail: Up to 30 people with flexible furniture, projection gear, sound system, and self-service bar. Full day (9:00-22:00) discounted to CZK 12,000.
landingCoworkOfficeText: Your own Palmovka base for a small team with 24/7 access and full workspace infrastructure included.
landingCoworkWorkstationText: Dual 27" monitors with Adobe Creative Cloud and CAD preinstalled. Bring your files and ship faster.
landingCoworkComingSoonText: Cowork day passes and workstations with pro licences are launching soon. Monthly office and private office options remain available.
landingPricingSubtitle: Choose your day mode. Every pass includes self-service access and a calm production environment.
landingPricingComingSoonNote: This cowork offer is marked as coming soon and is not bookable yet.
landingPricingItemOneText: Open-space desk, high-speed Wi-Fi, and post-mix water included.
landingPricingItemTwoText: Desk + unlimited batch brew coffee pass and daily soup for uninterrupted flow.
landingPricingItemThreeText: Dual 27" monitors, pro software licenses (Adobe Creative Cloud / CAD), and unlimited coffee.
landingPricingItemFourText: Multifunctional event space for up to 60 people with AV and self-service bar.
landingPrivateOfficeText: Private office in Palmovka with no utility overhead, unique code access, and unlimited coffee for the whole team.
landingPrivateOfficePerkThree: 5 meeting room hours per month included
landingMeetingRoomText: Looking for a calm space for a one-shot, campaign, or small community game night? Our meeting room also works as a cozy base for RPG and DnD groups who want an uninterrupted evening session with comfort and easy access.
landingMeetingRoomReservationFallbackBef: If the reservation flow is not working, email us at
landingMeetingRoomReservationFallbackAft: and we will arrange the booking manually.
landingMeetingRoomGalleryImageOneAlt: Current meeting room photo for RPG and DnD evenings
landingMeetingRoomGalleryImageTwoAlt: Another view of the meeting room prepared for play
landingUniversumLead: A place where work and play make sense in one continuous day.
landingUniversumParagraphOne: Deskohub is not just an address in Palmovka. It is a living ecosystem where work, creativity, and downtime can coexist.
landingUniversumParagraphTwo: Mornings are for focus and production with solid infrastructure. Evenings continue one door away in our board game space built by friends for community.
landingUniversumParagraphThree: We combine modern automation (code entry and self-service flow) with real human connection around analog play.
landingFaqItemOneAnswer: Choose the setup online -> receive your code -> tap at the door -> start working or playing.
landingFaqItemTwoAnswer: Two minutes from Palmovka metro, Prague 8.
landingFaqItemThreeAnswer: Step next door into Deskohub Bar for drinks and hundreds of board games.
landingFooterContactTitle: Need a booking, tour, or team setup?
landingFooterContactLead: Reach out and we will shape the right setup, from private offices and upcoming cowork offers to full-day events.
footerVatStatus: VAT status: not a VAT payer
contactMetadataTitle: Contact Deskohub Workspace | Reach out about cowork, events, and private rooms
contactMetadataDescription: Send a message to Deskohub Workspace about cowork passes, event rentals, private offices, or meeting room bookings in Palmovka.
contactHeroTitle: Tell us what kind of day you want to build.
contactHeroLead: Use the form below for cowork questions, event requests, private office inquiries, or anything that needs a human answer from the workspace team.
contactFormTitle: Send one clear brief. We will take it from there.
contactFormDescription: Minimal friction, no extra steps. Share the context, preferred timing, and anything your team needs from the space.
contactMessagePlaceholder: What do you need from Deskohub Workspace?
contactPrivacyNoteBefore: By sending this form, you confirm that you have read our
contactPrivacyNoteAfter: and agree that we may use your details to respond to your request.
cookieConsentConsentModalTitle: We use cookies for a reliable workspace site experience.
cookieConsentConsentModalDescription: Necessary cookies keep the site working. Optional cookies help us understand usage and remember preferences only if you allow them.
cookieConsentPreferencesUsageDescription: You can decide which optional cookie categories are allowed. Necessary cookies stay enabled because the site depends on them.
cookieConsentPreferencesNecessaryDescrip: These cookies support core website operation, locale handling, and storing your consent choice.
cookieConsentPreferencesAnalyticsDescrip: These cookies help us understand aggregate site usage if analytics tools are active.
cookieConsentPreferencesMarketingDescrip: These cookies would support advertising or remarketing tools if they are enabled in the future.
cookieConsentPreferencesPersonalizationD: These cookies remember optional display or interaction preferences when such features are available.
cookieSettingsDescription: Use this page to review or update which optional cookie categories you allow on the Deskohub Workspace site.
cookieSettingsNecessaryDescription: Required for basic functionality, locale routing, security, and storing consent choices.
cookieSettingsAnalyticsDescription: Help us evaluate overall site usage patterns when analytics tooling is enabled.
cookieSettingsMarketingDescription: Would support advertising or campaign measurement tools if they are used later.
cookieSettingsPreferencesDescription: Remember optional presentation or interaction choices when those features exist.
